7:["$","article",null,{"className":"prose prose-zinc max-w-none","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-8 not-prose","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl font-bold mb-2","children":"Designing a Production-Grade Multi-Agent Platform"}],["$","time",null,{"className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground","children":"October 1, 2025"}]]}],[["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Multi-agent systems are moving from research curiosity to production reality. This post shares lessons from building Shannon, a platform deployed at several Fortune 500 companies."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Core Design Principles"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"1. Deterministic Replay"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"In production, agents will fail. When they do, you need to understand exactly why."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Every agent execution must be:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Logged"}],": Complete trace of inputs, outputs, and intermediate states"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Replayable"}],": Given the same inputs, reproduce the exact same behavior"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Inspectable"}],": Human-readable representation of agent reasoning"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Implementation:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"className":"bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-meta","children":"@traceable"}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"class"}]," ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-title class_","children":"Agent"}],":\n    ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"def"}]," ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-title function_","children":"run"}],"(",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-params","children":"self, task: Task"}],") -> Result:\n        ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# All LLM calls, tool uses, and state changes are logged"}],"\n        ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# Can be replayed later with identical outputs"}],"\n        ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"pass"}],"\n"]}]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"2. Budget Enforcement"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents can consume unbounded resources if not constrained:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Token budgets"}],": Maximum tokens per task, per step, per tool call"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Time budgets"}],": Maximum execution time with graceful degradation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cost budgets"}],": Maximum dollar cost per task"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"When budgets are exceeded, the system must fail gracefully with a partial result, not crash."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"3. Fault Isolation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents should not bring down the system:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Process isolation"}],": Each agent runs in a separate process/container"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Circuit breakers"}],": Temporarily disable failing agents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Graceful degradation"}],": Reduce agent complexity rather than fail entirely"]}],"\n"]}],"\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a"]]}]
10:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Communication Patterns"}]
11:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"Hierarchical"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"A single orchestrator delegates to specialized agents:"}]
13:["$","pre",null,{"className":"bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":"Orchestrator\n├── Research Agent\n├── Code Agent\n└── Review Agent\n"}]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Pros: Simple, clear responsibility\nCons: Single point of failure, potential bottleneck"}]
15:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"Flat (Peer-to-Peer)"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents communicate directly through a message bus:"}]
17:["$","pre",null,{"className":"bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":"Agent A ←→ Message Bus ←→ Agent B\n              ↕\n           Agent C\n"}]}]
18:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Pros: Flexible, scalable\nCons: Harder to debug, potential for message storms"}]
19:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"Market-Based"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents bid for tasks based on their capabilities:"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Pros: Efficient resource allocation, emergent specialization\nCons: Complex auction mechanisms, harder to predict behavior"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"We found hierarchical works best for most enterprise use cases, with flat for specialized workflows."}]
1d:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"State Management"}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents need memory, but unconstrained memory leads to:"}]
1f:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Context overflow"}],": Exceeding LLM token limits"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy risks"}],": Storing sensitive data indefinitely"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Performance degradation"}],": Longer context = slower inference"]}],"\n"]}]
20:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Our approach:"}]
21:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working memory"}],": Recent conversation history (sliding window)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic memory"}],": Summarized past interactions (vector store)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Semantic memory"}],": Learned facts and rules (knowledge graph)"]}],"\n"]}]
22:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Observability"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"You can't improve what you can't measure:"}]
24:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency"}],": Time to first token, time to completion"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Quality"}],": Human evaluations, automated benchmarks"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cost"}],": Tokens, compute, API calls"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Reliability"}],": Success rate, error types"]}],"\n"]}]
25:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Build dashboards before deploying to production."}]
26:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Security Considerations"}]
27:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents with tool access are powerful and dangerous:"}]
28:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Principle of least privilege"}],": Agents only get access to what they need"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Human-in-the-loop"}],": High-stakes actions require approval"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Audit logging"}],": Every action attributable to a user and agent"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sandboxing"}],": Agent code runs in restricted environments"]}],"\n"]}]
29:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"What's Next"}]
2a:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The next frontier is agent composition: building complex systems from simple, reusable agent components. Think Unix pipes, but for AI agents."}]
c:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}]]
2b:I[27201,["/_next/static/chunks/ff1a16fafef87110.js","/_next/static/chunks/d2be314c3ece3fbe.js"],"IconMark"]
a:null
e:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Designing a Production-Grade Multi-Agent Platform | Carlos Chen"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"A comprehensive guide to building robust multi-agent systems that can handle real-world complexity and scale."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"icon","href":"/favicon.ico?favicon.0b3bf435.ico","sizes":"256x256","type":"image/x-icon"}],["$","$L2b","3",{}]]
